message:
fix(pipeline,serve,tmux): add panic recovery to goroutines, prevent closed-channel drains

Pipeline CLI (pipeline.go):
- Added defer/recover wrappers to goroutines running executor.Run()
  and executor.Resume() so that a panic in the pipeline executor
  closes the done channel instead of crashing the entire process
- Set progress channel to nil after it closes to prevent re-reading
  from a closed channel in the select loop
- Guard the post-completion drain loop with a nil check on progress
- Handle nil state from the done channel (crash case) with an explicit
  error message and non-zero exit

Pipeline server (pipelines.go):
- Added defer/recover wrappers to all pipeline-related goroutines
  (runPipelineWithResult, execPipelineInline, resumePipelineWithResult,
  and their background-mode variants) to prevent panics from taking
  down the HTTP server

Tmux pane streamer (pane_streamer.go):
- Added defer/recover to the FIFO reader goroutine to prevent panics
  from a malformed FIFO read from propagating

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
